title: San Rafael Police Department Human Trafficking

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All documents produced between January 1st, 2023 until March 16th 2026 that include the term "human trafficking" "Eighteenth Street Gang" "Nortenos" "Mafia" "Nuestra Familia" "homeless" "unhoused" produced by the San Rafael police department. 

All police reports pertaining to human trafficking produced between January 1st, 2023 until March 16th 2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Robbie Powelson

title: Nevada Public Records Request - Mountain West Tournament Location Agreement (University of Nevada, Las Vegas)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I request records related to the University of Nevada, Las Vegas decision to remain in the Mountain West Conference and the agreement regarding the Mountain West men’s and women’s basketball championships being held at the Thomas & Mack Center.
I request the following records created between January 1, 2023 and December 31, 2024:
1. Emails, text messages, or other communications discussing the location of the Mountain West basketball championships, including references to “Thomas & Mack Center,” “Las Vegas host agreement,” or “conference tournament location.”
2. The documents of understanding or other agreements between UNLV and the Mountain West Conference related to conference membership through 2032.
3. Documents, reports, or presentations related to financial incentives or guarantees associated with hosting the Mountain West basketball championships in Las Vegas.
4. Communications between UNLV leadership and Mountain West Conference officials regarding tournament hosting arrangements.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Maia Ancho
